category_sources: Official Hexo docs say Hexo generates static files from Markdown or other markup languages.
source_facts.description says Hexo is a fast, simple and powerful blog framework.
display_name_sources: Official Hexo documentation and repository brand the project as Hexo.
docs_sources: Official Hexo site provides a dedicated /docs documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official Hexo documentation and GitHub link to hexojs/hexo.
tags_sources: Official Hexo docs mention Node.js requirements and Markdown-based static file generation.
